name: Incline Bench Dumbbell Row
description: Set an adjustable bench to about 30-45 degrees. Lie face down with your chest against the pad, feet on the floor for stability. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with arms hanging straight down. Row both dumbbells up by driving elbows back and squeezing shoulder blades together at the top. Lower with control. The chest support eliminates momentum and protects the lower back, allowing you to focus purely on the back muscles.
